title: citrus × leclerei
intro: Citrus × leclerei, also known as the Meyer lemon, is a hybrid citrus plant resulting from the cross between a lemon (Citrus limon) and an orange (Citrus sinensis). The medicinal properties of the Meyer lemon include its high concentration of vitamin C and flavonoids, which exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of consuming Meyer lemon include its potential to boost the immune system, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Meyer lemon can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and juices, which are often used to support digestive health and relieve cold and flu symptoms.
